name: Raindrop.io Bookmark Manager API
what_it_does: Visual bookmark manager and content curation tool with REST API — enabling users to save, organize, and rediscover web content with visual previews, tags, collections (folders), full-text search, PDF and image saving, team collaboration on shared collections, and public collection sharing, with a clean API for bookmark management integrations.
use_cases: Saving bookmarks and web content to Raindrop.io collections via API for automation and integration
Retrieving and searching bookmark collections via Raindrop API for PKM system integration
Organizing bookmarks with tags and nested collections via API for content curation workflow
Syncing Raindrop bookmarks with note-taking tools (Obsidian, Notion) via API
Building browser extensions and productivity tools using Raindrop.io as bookmark backend
not_for: Team knowledge management at enterprise scale (Raindrop is personal/small team focus)
Document management (Raindrop is for web links and media, not document workflows)
RSS and news aggregation (use Feedly or Inoreader for feed-based news consumption)
best_when: A knowledge worker needs a visual, searchable bookmark manager with a clean API for automation — especially for building personal PKM workflows that sync bookmarks to Obsidian, Notion, or custom tools via Zapier or direct API.
avoid_when: You need enterprise-scale team knowledge management, document workflows, video hosting, or RSS/news aggregation.

auth.notes: OAuth2 authorization code flow for user-delegated access. Test token (personal API key) for personal integrations. Bearer token auth. User-scoped access. Webhook for collection change events. REST API v1 for bookmark and collection management. Integration with Zapier, Make (Integromat), IFTTT. No fine-grained scopes — full account access per OAuth grant. MCP server available.

pricing.paid_tiers: Pro $3/month or $28/year (nested collections, full-text search, broken link detection, permanent copies)
pricing.notes: Ukrainian developer (Rustem Mussabekov, solo founder). Founded 2013. Bootstrapped by single developer. Beloved by power users for its balance of features and simplicity. 15M+ registered users. Premium tier extremely affordable ($3/month). MCP server available for AI integration. Strong Zapier and Make integration for automation. Visual bookmark cards (screenshot previews) differentiate from text-only competitors. App available for iOS, Android, macOS, Windows, and all major browsers. Ukrainian solo dev has maintained through 2022 Russian invasion.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API v1 for bookmark management. OAuth2 + personal token auth. Good developer documentation. Webhook for collection changes. MCP server for AI agent integration. Rate limit 120 req/min well-documented. Solo Ukrainian developer — excellent product but single-person risk. EU data residency. Affordable Pro tier unlocks full-text search (important for agent use cases).
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Bookmark reads fully idempotent. Collection reads idempotent. Bookmark creation idempotent for same URL in same collection. Tag operations idempotent. Collection creation not idempotent — check by title.
known_agent_gotchas: Solo developer — business continuity risk for production integrations
Full-text search requires Pro plan ($3/month) — important for agent-driven search
Rate limit 120 req/min — adequate for most use cases but plan bulk operations carefully
Ukrainian solo developer — evaluate geopolitical risk for critical infrastructure
OAuth token expires — implement token refresh for long-running integrations

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. EU data residency. OAuth2 auth. Solo developer with privacy-first culture. Bookmark data reflects user interests and browsing habits — privacy-sensitive. MCP server adds AI integration surface — review MCP access scope. No OAuth scope granularity — full account access per grant. Personal token (test token) should not be used in production multi-user apps. Webhook HMAC verification recommended.
